name: Browserless
tagline: A headless Chrome browser as a service.
description:
A headless Chrome browser as a service.

Docs: https://docs.browserless.io/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  browserless:
    image: ghcr.io/browserless/chromium
    environment:
      - TOKEN=a99925719d274d7e7ee47f8075b85ad6
    expose:
      - 3000
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000/docs
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42004:3000
